transcription.text: For the finest breakfast variety to ever brighten your morning, pick a pack of Cheerios, pick a pack of Trix, pick a pack of Jets, pick a pack of Kix and Wheaties, too. The choice is up to you with the Betty Crocker Pick-a-Pack Package. Ten individual servings, handiest cereal package of all. So next time, pick a pack of Cheerios, pick a pack of Trix, pick a pack of Jets, pick a pack of Kix and Wheaties, too. The choice is up to you with the Betty Crocker Pick-a-Pack Package.
